{{Quote|The worms will work their way through you, feeding off the walls of your arteries... until your whole nervous system is on fire!|[[Vonya]] to [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]|<ref name="IE3">[[Star Wars (1998) 25|''Star Wars'' (1998) 25]]</ref>}}
'''Artery worms''' were tiny, vicious [[Worm/Legends|worms]] native to [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]].

==History==
During the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], artery worms were a [[Torture/Legends|torture]] method favored by the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]] of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. The torture involved force-feeding<ref name="IE3" /> or injecting the victim with<ref name="IE3" /> liquid containing artery worms.<ref name="IE2">[[Star Wars (1998) 24|''Star Wars'' (1998) 24]]</ref> When ingested, an artery worm would burrow through its host's veins, "turning them to molten [[Fire/Legends|fire]]" (according to the Witches) as it digested them.<ref name="IE3" /> A Nightsister would survive after a day of torture; but others would [[Death/Legends|die]], unless they were given a potion containing witch [[Blood/Legends|blood]], which would rid the victim of the worms, provided the creatures hadn't reached their [[Heart/Legends|heart]].<ref name="IE3" />

In [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] was sent on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] to inquire about the sudden disappearance of [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ova]].<ref name="IE1">[[Star Wars (1998) 23|''Star Wars'' (1998) 23]]</ref> When [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Zalem/Legends|Zalem]] discovered his identity, she decided to "charm him to death" by injecting worms in his arteries. Vos was saved by [[Ros Lai]], Zalem's own daughter, who gave him witch blood potion.<ref name="IE3" />
